events.text: Goal!  Bosnia and Herzegovina 1, IR Iran 0. Edin Dzeko (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Miralem Pjanic.

Goal!  Bosnia and Herzegovina 2, IR Iran 0. Miralem Pjanic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Tino-Sven Susic with a through ball.
Muhamed Besic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Bosnia and Herzegovina 2, IR Iran 1. Reza Ghoochannejhad (IR Iran) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Javad Nekounam with a cross.
Goal!  Bosnia and Herzegovina 3, IR Iran 1. Avdija Vrsajevic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Sejad Salihovic.
Karim Ansarifard (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card.

venue.name: Casa de Apostas Arena Fonte Nova
